title: subitems not grouped in right group or parent task

posts.author: emily.cornes (Emily)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI, I want to group my subtasks under the parent tasks under each of the groups of my project.

However, looking through previous discussion, I found the following settings will do this:

However, when I do this, all my subtasks from all the groups end up under one group which has the label of another group. See below (the second picture doesnt give the list justice - but there are over 100 subtasks in there belonging to other groups):

image417×678 41.6 KB

Is this a bug, or is there another setting I need to apply?
